title: NZ Information Sharing Standard — Purpose and Scope
description: New Zealand government standard requiring public service agencies to establish legally binding information sharing agreements with non-government third parties when sharing personal information. Provides implementation guidance, risk assessment frameworks, and model agreement clauses to ensure adequate controls and privacy protection.
